name: Leonarr
description: Discord bridge for Oscarr — link your Discord account, search TMDB and submit requests via slash commands, get DMed when your media is ready.
author: Keda

capabilityReasons.settings:plugin: Stores the bot token, Discord client id, optional guild scoping and the announce channel id.
capabilityReasons.settings:app: Reads AppSettings.siteUrl to build the canonical OAuth deep link sent by /link.
capabilityReasons.users:read: Resolves the Oscarr user linked to a Discord id (via findUserByProvider) before every command, and lists their providers when DMing notifications.
capabilityReasons.tmdb:read: /search autocomplete queries TMDB through Oscarr's cached proxy — no plugin-side API key required.
capabilityReasons.requests:read: /status reads the user's requests and batched media progress to show queue info.
capabilityReasons.requests:write: /search → submit creates a request as the linked Oscarr user, through the exact pipeline POST /api/requests uses.
capabilityReasons.events: Subscribes to user.notification.created + media.available so DMs and channel posts fire without cron polling.
capabilityReasons.permissions: Registers the 'leonarr.control' permission + RBAC rules for POST /api/plugins/leonarr/{start,stop,restart} so only admins (or roles explicitly granted) can drive the Discord bot.

settings.label: Guild id to scope slash commands (empty = register globally)
Channel id for media.available broadcasts (empty = DM only)
